title: Musicians and Singers
description: Play one or more musical instruments or sing. May perform on stage, for broadcasting, or for sound or video recording.

tasks.text: Perform before live audiences in concerts, recitals, educational presentations, and other social gatherings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sing a cappella or with musical accompaniment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret or modify music, applying knowledge of harmony, melody, rhythm, and voice production to individualize presentations and maintain audience interest.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Specialize in playing a specific family of instruments or a particular type of music.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sing as a soloist or as a member of a vocal group.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe choral leaders or prompters for cues or directions in vocal presentation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Memorize musical selections and routines, or sing following printed text, musical notation, or customer instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Play musical instruments as soloists, or as members or guest artists of musical groups such as orchestras, ensembles, or bands.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sight-read musical parts during rehearsals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Play from memory or by following scores.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Practice singing exercises and study with vocal coaches to develop voice and skills and to rehearse for upcoming roles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Listen to recordings to master pieces or to maintain and improve skills.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Teach music for specific instruments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide the musical background for live shows, such as ballets, operas, musical theatre, and cabarets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Audition for orchestras, bands, or other musical groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Seek out and learn new music suitable for live performance or recording.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make or participate in recordings in music studios.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Promote their own or their group's music by participating in media interviews and other activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make or participate in recordings.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Research particular roles to find out more about a character, or the time and place in which a piece is set.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Learn acting, dancing, and other skills required for dramatic singing roles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transpose music to alternate keys, or to fit individual styles or purposes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct bands or orchestras.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compose songs or create vocal arrangements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange and edit music to fit style and purpose.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Improvise music during performances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with a manager or agent who handles administrative details, finds work, and negotiates contracts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform in television, radio, or movie productions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Practice performances, individually or in rehearsal with other musicians, to master individual pieces of music or to maintain and improve skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
